label: Leadership & Governance
description: Integrity starts at the top. This dimension evaluates whether senior leadership sets a clear ethical tone, embeds integrity into governance structures, and actively champions a culture of accountability throughout the organisation.

label: Anti-corruption Policies
description: Robust anti-corruption policies are the backbone of organisational integrity. This dimension assesses the strength, scope, and implementation of your anti-bribery frameworks, risk assessments, and due diligence processes.

label: Transparency & Disclosure
description: Public trust depends on openness. This dimension measures how proactively your organisation discloses financial data, procurement processes, and decision-making to stakeholders and the public.

label: Whistleblower Protection
description: Safe reporting channels are essential for uncovering misconduct. This dimension evaluates your organisation's whistleblower protections, anonymous reporting mechanisms, and investigation procedures.

label: Accountability & Oversight
description: Effective detection and remediation systems close the integrity loop. This dimension examines your audit capabilities, disciplinary consistency, compliance monitoring, and corrective action processes.

label: Stakeholder Engagement
description: Diverse perspectives strengthen integrity outcomes. This dimension assesses how meaningfully your organisation engages civil society, communities, and external stakeholders in shaping and monitoring integrity policies.
